Ropes.info: An interactive rope simulation built from scratch in JavaScript using Verlet integration. Explore physically simulated ropes, constraints, and real-time interaction through a lightweight custom engine.

Falling Sand.info: A falling-sand sandbox simulation featuring over fifty unique materials and emergent interactions. Includes a controllable character capable of shooting particles, creating dynamic and often unpredictable simulations.

Logic Gates.info: A visual node-based logic simulator where digital circuits can be assembled and evaluated in real time. The same node system can also be used to build experimental audio synthesis graphs.

Marbles.info: A lightweight physics playground built around realistic marble interactions. Experiment with collisions, gravity, and momentum inside a simple but satisfying simulation.
